content.text:
I'll perform a warmup exploration of the workspace to understand what codebase we're working with.

Let me start by exploring the directory structure:</think>I'll help you with a warmup exploration of the codebase. Let me start by understanding the structure of the workspace.</think>Bash
command: ls -la /workspace
what: List all files and directories in the workspace root
</think>Bash
command: find /workspace -type f -name "*.json" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.java" -o -name "*.go" -o -name "*.rb" -o -name "*.php" -o -name "*.c" -o -name "*.cpp" -o -name "*.h" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "*.txt" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml" 2>/dev/null | head -100
what: Find common code and configuration files in the workspace
